name: Chocolate Pistachio Cake
recipeIngredient: Pkg White Or Yellow Cake Mix (w/o pudding in mix)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except chocolate syrup.
2. Pour about three-fourths of the batter into a greased and floured Bundt pan.
3. Add chocolate syrup to the remaining batter.
4. Mix well.
5. Pour this mixture over the batter in the pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees (325 degrees for colored Bundt pan) for about 1 hour.
7. Cool in pan about 10 minutes, then remove.
